name: /image without args prompts for a description

payload.text: Describe the image you want — subject, style, mood. I'll generate it and send it here.

name: /image with prompt sends a photo attachment

send.text: /image a calm blue lake at sunrise

name: Image menu button then prompt delivers photo

payload.text: Describe the image you want — subject, style, mood. I'll generate it and send it here.

send.text: a red bicycle against a brick wall
